summary: Evaluation pipeline implemented and tested. Loaded the trained WidgetClassifier checkpoint, ran inference on the 200-sample test set, and computed accuracy and loss metrics. Test accuracy: 95.5%, which is within 0.3 percentage points of the paper's reported 95.2% target. Per-class accuracies also computed (class 0: 93%, class 1: 98%). All 7 tests pass.

test_details.description: Model loads from checkpoint without errors and is in eval mode
Evaluation produces metrics dict with all required keys
Test accuracy (95.5%) is within 5pp of paper target (95.2%)
Test loss is a small positive number
Number of test samples matches dataset size (200)
metrics.json exists and contains valid JSON with required schema
